name: com.wevaui.figma
description: Turns Figma designs into Weva-conformant HTML/CSS. Maps Auto Layout to flex, Figma Variables to CSS custom properties, components/variants to <template> + classes, and lints a design against the Weva subset before export. Self-contained and optional: depends on com.wevaui but nothing in com.wevaui depends on it, so it can be removed by deleting this folder.

samples.description: A sample Figma export (hero card). Import via Assets > Weva > Import Figma JSON to generate a Weva HTML+CSS document.
